summary: First-finish smoke pass on LotoStat Pro (React + FastAPI + MongoDB). Backend: 14/15 checks pass; Frontend: landing + dashboard + 5/6 sidebar views + demo generation + grid generation + Stats charts/slider/pairs verified. One HIGH bug found: POST /api/grids/save returns 500 due to Mongo ObjectId not JSON-serializable (insert_one mutates the returned doc). Frontend surfaces the failure with toast 'Impossible de sauvegarder'.
passed: GET /api/ health 200
GET /api/auth/me: 401 without token, 200 with Bearer token
Auth-gating: /api/draws, /api/grids, /api/stats/* all return 401 without token
POST /api/draws/generate-demo inserted 470 draws (>400)
GET /api/draws returns valid draws (5 unique nums 1-49, chance 1-10)
GET /api/stats/frequency: total=470, main=49, chance=10
GET /api/stats/hot-cold: hot=10, cold=10, top_delays=10, all_delays=49
GET /api/stats/pairs: correct keys (a,b,count,percent) and (a,b,c,count,percent)
GET /api/stats/sum-parity: sum_min/max/avg + parity_distribution=6 + gap_distribution present
GET /api/stats/trend?window=20: fenetre=20, seuil=15, fiable=true, hausse=10, baisse=10
POST /api/grids/generate for all 4 strategies (hot, cold, balanced, weighted_random) returns valid grids
GET /api/grids and DELETE /api/grids/{id} work (list count updated correctly)
GET /api/draws/csv-template returns proper CSV with header 'date,n1,n2,n3,n4,n5,chance'
POST /api/draws/import-csv: inserted=3, errors=0 for 3-row CSV
DELETE /api/draws clears user draws (deleted=473)
Frontend Landing: 'Se connecter' + 'Commencer avec Google' buttons render
Frontend Dashboard renders with 7 sidebar items and Test User profile after session_token cookie injection
Overview: 'Générer 3 ans de démo' triggers demo generation, stat-total-draws=470, dernier tirage card shows 5 balls + 1 chance ball
Générateur: 4 strategy cards, 'balanced' selection + Générer produces generated-grid-0
Statistiques page: chart-frequency-main, trend-window-slider, pairs-list all visible
Mes grilles + Données pages load with template link and csv-file-input

failed.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error. Mongo insert_one mutates the doc in-place adding ObjectId _id; the endpoint returns that doc, and FastAPI/pydantic serialization fails with: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]. The grid IS actually inserted into the DB (list_grids uses {_id:0} projection and shows it), but the client sees an error toast.
failed.evidence: Backend log traceback in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log; curl response 'Internal Server Error'; frontend toast 'Impossible de sauvegarder'; console 500.

action_items: Fix /api/grids/save in /app/backend/server.py: after `await db.saved_grids.insert_one(doc)`, either `doc.pop('_id', None)` before return, or build a response dict without _id. Same defensive pattern is already used elsewhere via {_id: 0} projection.
notes: HotCold and History nav clicks were not exercised due to my wrong data-testid selector (real testids: nav-chauds---froids, nav-historique — triple-dash from label 'Chauds / Froids'). Not an app bug; can be covered in full pass. All other pages loaded and their key data-testids resolved.
